title: Roblox Q4 Results Top Estimates on Bookings and DAUs
text: Roblox Q4 2024 results topped analyst estimates on key metrics including bookings and daily active users. Bookings of $1.36 billion exceeded expectations, driven by strong monetization across the user base. Daily active users of 82.9 million showed impressive growth momentum reaching year-end holidays. Revenue of $988.2 million beat consensus estimates and represented 32% year-over-year growth. The company demonstrated strong execution despite competitive pressures in the gaming industry. Free cash flow generation remained a bright spot with $641.3 million generated in 2024. Adjusted EBITDA of $65.6 million showed progress toward profitability. Management outlined plans for continued international expansion and new market entry. The company discussed opportunities in education and professional markets beyond traditional gaming. Analyst sentiment remained mixed, with appreciation for strong execution tempered by guidance concerns. The company's path to profitability depended on margin expansion as the business scaled revenue.
